title: Catholic Things
description: Adds Catholic-inspired decorations, liturgical items, sacred art, and a new Yellow Ipe biome to Minecraft.
body:
**Watch porkinbr!**

**Catholic Things** is a decoration mod inspired by Catholic tradition, sacred art, and religious architecture. It adds a wide variety of liturgical objects, sacred imagery, and religious elements to Minecraft, allowing players to build churches, cathedrals, monasteries, and other Christian-themed structures with greater visual and symbolic fidelity.

The mod is designed for decoration, building, and roleplay, while remaining consistent with Minecraft’s visual style.

![itens and blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d052973440510d4754bbccffc4fccfeb5cba6074_0.webp)

### **Mod Content**
Decoration and Liturgy
Altars
Candlesticks
Church pews
Episcopal cathedra
Multiple chair models
Tabernacles made of gold, quartz, and stone bricks
Wall and altar crosses made of wood or gold
Sacred paintings and religious statues
Chalice, ciborium, and monstrances

### **Wearable Items**

Wearable mitre
Wearable crown
Placeable decorative crown
Sculpture System
Sculpting table used with a hammer
Creation of religious statues using blueprints
Some blueprints are craftable
Others can be purchased from cleric villagers
Yellow Ipe Biome

### **New biome featuring yellow ipe trees**

Ipe has its own dedicated wood set, including:
Logs
Leaves
Planks
Stairs
Slabs
Fences
Fence gates
Ideal for religious builds, villages, and decorative projects
Features
Decoration-focused mod
Suitable for religious, medieval, and roleplay builds
Content inspired by Catholic tradition
Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer servers
Note

This mod is purely decorative and artistic, aiming to respectfully represent elements of Catholic tradition within Minecraft.



### **Crafts**

To find out the crafts of the items, it is recommended to use the mod Just Enough Items (JEI)



### **Bugs and Suggestions.**

If you downloaded the mod, found a bug or want to leave suggestions, please contact us at discord.
